name: Stir-Fried Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
4 small carrots, peeled and cut into matchstick-size strips
1 red bell pepper, cut into matchstick-size strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the vegetables to the skillet and stir-fry until they are crisp-tender, which should take about 8 minutes.
3. Season the vegetables to taste with salt and pepper.
